relationship_explanation: The UID spans implemented ActiveRetrievalBrief, deterministic reduction, relevance gating, pending-topic state, runtime compression, synthesis, and a Blackboard boundary; these responsibilities are distributed across multiple memory files and runtime_config, so no single Python file owns the full normative scope.

The UID governs a cross-cutting memory-management boundary spanning recording, files, ingestion, retrieval, compression, synthesis, SuperPrompt handoff, configuration JSON, and/or sibling requirement ownership, so no single Python file owns the full normative scope.
